evidence.detail: Current /v1/models probe returned HTTP 200 for mikoto/gpt-image-2. The append-only paid ledger records TASK_ACCEPTED and COMPLETED for one-provider/one-key async requests to /v1/images/generations/async with nine ordered reference SHA-256 values.

transportEvidence.detail: The local primary-per-asset projection preserves every logical asset and source hash while selecting one stable provider image per asset. A 43-shot no-network run resolves every shot to at most six ordered provider references, below mikoto's verified capacity nine.

semanticRoleEvidence.detail: The generations JSON payload sends prompt plus ordered image_urls only. scene-viewpoint/canonical/prop-state labels are local evidence and prompt markers, not provider-native role fields.

evidence.detail: Historical mechanism evidence only. Toonflow batchGenerateImage.ts preserves o_assets2Storyboard rowid order and reuses one o_assets.imageId per logical asset; local_ai.ts sends ordered repeated multipart image fields to synchronous /v1/images/edits. The operator confirmed this local endpoint is no longer a MYStudio production dependency, so this record must not authorize requests.

semanticRoleEvidence.detail: The historical multipart request repeats image fields in order but sends no provider-native reference-role metadata.
